onboardingWizard.title: Get started with DeployBox
onboardingWizard.repoHint: Pick a provider and repository. Connect with the button below—no need to leave this page.
onboardingWizard.noProviders: No connected providers of this type
onboardingWizard.proRequiredAeza: Aeza cards are available on a paid plan
onboardingWizard.freeServerHint: Free includes one server (Aeza or your VPS). Limits are enforced on the server when creating a server.
onboardingWizard.composeSoon: Docker Compose — use Compose in the project (wizard support coming soon)
onboardingWizard.deploySkipped: No repository selected — you can deploy later from the project.
